name: cross-loop reference always carries an explicit class equal to pr-corpus tag for downstream filtering
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf 'rule_id: no-eval\norigin_loop: pr-corpus\n' > rule-card.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/cross-loop/validate-tag.sh" --card rule-card.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'class=pr-corpus' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
